Class GPTModel

java.lang.Object
io.github.kirstenali.deepj.models.gpt.GPTModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Persistable, Trainable
public final class GPTModel extends Object implements Trainable, Persistable
Minimal GPT-style decoder-only transformer for educational/training use. CPU-only and dependency-free; intended for small models.
